calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Case Called this day: Hon. Winslow Christian presiding re Unlawful Detainer Prove-Up Hearing, Non-Payment; Clerk: M. Manzella; CSR: MATTER NOT REPORTED; Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq.appears for Plaintiff William Gee & Anita Gee re real property at 2406 - 41st Avenue, San Francisco, California; Plaintiff William Gee c/s, doc. evidence intrdc'd & marked; Court hears evidence and awards judgment in favor of Plaintiffs William Gee & Anita Gee and against Defendants Heather Apodaca & Chawn Anderson as follows: Plaintiff awarded judgment for possession and restitution of the premiese located at 2406 - 41st Ave.(lower unit), S.F.,CA; Plaintiff shall have judgment for back rent of $4606.44 and 32 days of daily damages at the rate of $55.67 per day which is $1781.44 for a total of $6387.88; Plaintiff is awarded attorney's fees in the amount of $975.00; Plaintiff is awarded their costs pursuant to a cost memorandum; the rental agreement for the premises is forfeited. TOTAL MONETARY JUDGMENT:$7362.88; all exhibits returned to counsel for Plaintiff. The Court signs the judgment in open court. (No appearance this day by Defendants Heather Apodaca or Chawn Anderson.)
